title: Implement Quality Observability Tables in Notebook
description: Add table creation and population logic for gold_quality_history, gold_gap_registry, and gold_low_confidence_audit to the silver-to-gold2 notebook.

reasoning.why: Table schemas are designed in data_quality_architecture.md but don't exist in Fabric yet. Without the tables, we can't capture quality metrics or track gap lifecycle.
businessValue: Enable trending quality metrics over time (Quality History)
Track how long gaps have existed and when they're resolved (Gap Registry)
Surface fuzzy matches for manual review (Low Confidence Audit)
reasoning.prerequisite: This task creates the infrastructure; Task 017 populates it with sample data for demo purposes

acceptanceCriteria: gold_quality_history table created in Fabric lakehouse
gold_gap_registry table created in Fabric lakehouse
gold_low_confidence_audit table created in Fabric lakehouse
Quality History: Append logic captures metrics after each pipeline run
Gap Registry: MERGE logic updates existing gaps, inserts new ones
Low Confidence Audit: Captures matches with confidence < 0.95
Tables are Delta format for MERGE support
dependencies: Existing quality scoring logic (source for low confidence matches)

subtasks.title: Add gold_quality_history table creation
subtasks.details: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS with schema from architecture doc

subtasks.title: Add gold_gap_registry table creation
subtasks.details: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS with schema from architecture doc

subtasks.title: Add gold_low_confidence_audit table creation
subtasks.details: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS with schema from architecture doc

subtasks.title: Implement Quality History append logic
subtasks.details: After each run, INSERT metrics: coverage_rate, match_rate, unmapped_count, etc.

subtasks.title: Implement Gap Registry MERGE logic
subtasks.details: MERGE pattern: update last_seen/occurrences for existing, insert new, mark resolved

subtasks.title: Implement Low Confidence Audit capture
subtasks.details: Filter fact_procurement for records with any confidence < 0.95, aggregate and insert

subtasks.title: Test in Fabric and verify tables populate
subtasks.details: Run pipeline, check tables have data, verify MERGE works on second run

tableSchemas.gold_quality_history: refresh_timestamp, layer, entity, metric_name, metric_value, threshold, breach_flag
tableSchemas.gold_gap_registry: gap_id, gap_natural_key, entity, gap_type, first_seen, last_seen, total_occurrences, current_status, estimated_impact, resolution_date, resolution_notes
tableSchemas.gold_low_confidence_audit: source_value, matched_to, confidence, entity, match_type, frequency, spend_impact, last_seen

notes: Use Delta format for MERGE support on Gap Registry
Low Confidence Audit can be overwrite or append depending on preference
Task 017 will populate with sample data after tables exist
